translation: From the Kanesh colony to <gap> our messenger, our messenger, our messenger and our messenger: The tablet is in the City.
In accordance with the verdict of the City, when the merchant comes up in the City, Da'ar will not raise claim against me in Nemilum, Da'ar will not raise claim.

If you have heard our letter, then send me word whether or not the palace gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before we gave our testimony before we gave our testimony before we gave our testimony.
I shall send our tablets to the city and the attorney, so that the merchant should give them to a merchant.
